ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gmsl_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of the observation (e.g., 1970.5 for mid-year) */,
  "gmsl_m" REAL /* Global Mean Sea Level in meters */,
  "lower_m" REAL /* Lower bound of the uncertainty interval in meters */,
  "upper_m" REAL /* Upper bound of the uncertainty interval in meters */,
  "type_data" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., observation, model prediction) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the observation (e.g., validated, unvalidated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the observation */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the observation (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gmsl_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Satellite X, Tide Gauge Y) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format (e.g., CSV, JSON, NetCDF) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Data frequency (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES gmsl_observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validator */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail, pending) */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Score assigned by the validator (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES gmsl_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the validator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the validator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the validator belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the validator belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_data" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation */,
  "start_year" REAL /* Start year of the aggregation period */,
  "end_year" REAL /* End year of the aggregation period */,
  "average_gmsl_m" REAL /* Average GMSL over the aggregation period */,
  "min_gmsl_m" REAL /* Minimum GMSL over the aggregation period */,
  "max_gmsl_m" REAL /* Maximum GMSL over the aggregation period */,
  "source_ids" TEXT /* Array of source IDs used in the aggregation */,
  "aggregation_method" TEXT /* Method used for aggregation (e.g., mean, median) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aggregation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the aggregation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_source_ids FOREIGN KEY ("source_ids") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uncertainty_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uncertainty analysis */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being analyzed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for uncertainty analysis (e.g., Monte Carlo, Bootstrap) */,
  "uncertainty_value" REAL /* Uncertainty value calculated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the uncertainty value */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uncertainty_analysis_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES gmsl_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gmsl_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "year" REAL /* Year of the prediction */,
  "gmsl_m" REAL /* GMSL value predicted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES gmsl_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being ingested */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was ingested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion process (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing task (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES gmsl_observations ("observation_id")
)
